executive_strategic_insight.core_theme: Pivoting from pure SIEM to unified security data platform with real-time detection-as-code
executive_strategic_insight.strategic_focus: Panther is positioning as the modern alternative to Splunk/Sumo Logic, emphasizing serverless architecture, detection-as-code using Python, and cost transparency. They're moving upmarket toward enterprise SOCs.
executive_strategic_insight.ecosystem_momentum: 8 new data source integrations including CrowdStrike Falcon, SentinelOne, and Okta. Focus on security tool consolidation.
executive_strategic_insight.persona_shift: Targeting security engineers and detection engineers specifically — building tools for teams that write detection logic, not just consume alerts.
executive_strategic_insight.pricing_model_shift: Usage-based pricing (per GB ingested) with committed use discounts. No free tier — enterprise-first approach.

engineering_capacity.velocity_assessment: Medium — bi-weekly releases, significant infrastructure investment reducing visible feature output

intelligence_signals.job_board_signals: Hiring senior backend engineers (Go), data engineers, and field CTOs. No junior roles visible — suggests mature team optimizing, not scaling broadly.
intelligence_signals.target_users: Detection engineers, security operations teams, and cloud-native security architects
intelligence_signals.monetization_approach: Enterprise SaaS with usage-based component. Large deal sizes ($200K+ ARR) targeting companies doing 1TB+/day log ingestion.
intelligence_signals.differentiators: Serverless architecture (no infrastructure management), detection-as-code (Python), transparent pricing model. Competes on cost efficiency vs legacy SIEMs.

gaps_exposed: No log ingestion or correlation features
Detection-as-code is a paradigm Securin doesn't address
areas_of_focus: Consider SIEM integration partnerships rather than building
Ensure Securin data can feed into Panther-like platforms via standard formats

product_specific.APT: Panther's detection engine could compete with APT threat detection if they expand into threat intelligence
product_specific.CSPM: Panther's cloud log analysis overlaps with CSPM cloud security monitoring
